rag_rules: Place output range guarantees in component type scopes using visible feature names and concrete bounds.
Use assign statements only for implementation-level output bindings with existing features.
Avoid introducing package-qualified identifiers or types not present in the AADL model.
generic_rules: Ensure AGREE expressions reference only visible AADL features or declared helpers.
Align helper declarations with the types of their assigned expressions.
Do not encode AADL properties as AGREE variables unless explicitly exposed in the model.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Component type annexes are for assumptions and guarantees; implementation annexes for bindings.
anti_patterns: Do not reference unresolved identifiers or invalid helper declarations in AGREE contracts.
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scopes.
irrelevant_topics: AADL Inspector diagnostics about package visibility
Model fusion or scope preservation rules
